---
title: Trip the slop detector
---

# Slop fixture

In today's fast-paced media landscape, newsrooms are looking to leverage AI-powered tools to streamline their workflow. We will delve into how three regional dailies have utilized large language models to revolutionize their pre-publication checks. It is worth noting that the results have been seamless. The Northern Herald has unleashed a robust new toolchain that seamlessly integrates with its CMS — empowering reporters to focus on what truly matters: the story. This is not just a workflow upgrade — it is a paradigm shift in how journalism gets made.

Furthermore, early adopters report meticulous gains in copy quality and a vibrant new culture of experimentation.
